environment.cpu: Intel Core i9-14900KF (8P+16E, 24 physical cores, 32 logical processors)
environment.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080 16303 MiB; CUDA available via torch 2.13.0+cu130
environment.formal_gpu_usage: NOT_USED: formal Shapely/NumPy/SciPy geometry and optimization pipeline is CPU-only

evidence: Layered success is evaluator-composed.
Controller CONVERGED maps only to TRACK_CONVERGED.
Same-resource records reject unequal active counts.
Adaptive-resource records remain a separate regime.
All failures remain in failure-rate composition.
Bootstrap replicas use normalized-arclength registration and deterministic cyclic phase alignment.
Signed-normal displacement and tangential residual are serialized with a stability score.
CALIBRATED_TUBE requires independent shape IDs and disjoint registered-curve hashes; otherwise the status is UNCALIBRATED_STABILITY.
Target, forbidden, and safety roles share one canonical polygon buffer and SHA-256.
MultiPolygon, holes, offset topology change, invalid/empty geometry, and room infeasibility are explicit outcomes.

S2.targeted_tests: 45 passed in 0.52s (S2 plus legacy periodic/resource compatibility)
evidence: Uniform phi=1 plans verify H*=L^3/(12m^2) and G=L/m against the continuous periodic objective.
Phase optimization searches the fundamental interval [0,L/m), preserves equal-arc spacing, and accepts scalar or pairwise routed costs.
Periodic Lloyd remains unchanged as a nonuniform-weight or ablation path.
Nominal and calibrated robust-envelope resource counts are separate fields.
CAPACITY_SHORTFALL, RESOURCE_UNCERTAIN, and HYSTERESIS_GAP_DEGRADED have fixed precedence and serialize without hiding secondary conditions.

S3.targeted_tests: 47 passed in 0.48s (routing, route assignment, legacy controller/safety compatibility)
evidence: Guide free space is the inward room minus the exact shared canonical crowd buffer, with disconnected components retained.
Straight, boundary-corridor, and deterministic visibility-graph routes return explicit clearance certificates.
A real one-sided U-shape inner-notch target is straight-line infeasible but visibility-route feasible.
Hungarian assignment accepts geodesic path-length matrices and reports ROUTE_INFEASIBLE when no finite complete matching exists.
Cyclic order-preserving assignment supports rotations, reserve guides, capacity shortfall, and deterministic ties.
Unreachable in-memory costs serialize as JSON null plus an explicit reachability mask.

S4.targeted_tests: 28 passed in 0.49s (waypoint plus legacy episode/safety compatibility)
evidence: Fixed waypoint paths use a content-derived path version and immutable flat-points/offsets representation.
Every interval records nominal control, safety-applied control, Euler integration, post-integration waypoint advance, remaining path, and progress.
Frame arrays have T+1 entries while control and safety arrays have T entries.
No-progress detection uses a remaining-path window and terminates with an explicit replan/terminal reason.
ROUTE_INFEASIBLE returns an initial-only trace and never calls the safety/controller callback.
CONVERGED remains tracking-only and is not promoted to deployment success by the runner.

S5.targeted_tests: 46 passed in 0.55s (S5, waypoint adapter, legacy safety/controller compatibility)
S5.g6_readonly_audit: PASS: 12 compact evidence and 3 legacy media hashes
evidence: Dykstra and slsqp_convex_qcqp consume one immutable hashed VelocityProjectionProblem with identical half-spaces and speed balls.
The problem is accurately labelled a strongly convex QCQP/SOCP-representable projection, not a pure linear-constraint QP.
Certificates report primal, stationarity, complementarity, dual/KKT residuals, runtime, iterations, objective, and control adjustment.
Guide-pair, crowd, and room initial-state violations fail explicitly before projection.
Numerical residual failure is distinct from a supported infeasibility certificate.
ZOH dense checks include interval endpoints, dense samples, and relative-motion critical times.
Limitations explicitly reject human-safety certification and unconditional continuous-time safety claims.
independent_review_fixes_revalidated: strict JSON handling for nonfinite route costs

prefreeze_validation.independent_audit: PASS before formal execution; post-run presentation and provenance limitations are documented separately
prefreeze_validation.parallel_contract: PASS: 24 case-level spawn workers, numeric libraries limited to one thread, serial/parallel deterministic projection identical
prefreeze_validation.clean_checkout_test: PASS: detached local clone runs the formal media CLI and verifies seven assets plus SHA-256 manifest

S6.post_run_status: Renderer semantics and Git-blob provenance hashing were corrected after the frozen FAIL run. At the user's request no replacement Holdout was run, so these corrections do not alter the formal result.
S6.note: G7 FAIL. The complete 330-record frozen Holdout is retained; no failure was removed from a binary denominator.
